entities.name: Cohesion
entities.context: Metric measuring overall strategic alignment (0.78 in example)

entities.name: Trajectory
entities.context: Metric measuring directional trend of support over time

relationships.context: Report uses cohesion as top-level strategic alignment metric
Report uses consensus to measure theme agreement
Report uses divergence to measure theme conflict
Report uses trajectory to show support direction over time
